name: @gonext/theme-sdk
description: Theme SDK for GoNext. TypeScript types for theme.json mirroring packages/go/theme, template-hierarchy helpers mirroring packages/go/theme/templates, CSS-custom-property helpers, and a defineTheme() identity helper for type-safe theme manifests. Used by theme authors. Apache-2.0.

scripts.build: echo '@gonext/theme-sdk: source-only package, no build step'
